security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: OpenBLS is a free, open-source bilateral-stimulation tool built for licensed clinicians. It delivers configurable visual and audio bilateral-stimulation patterns. Local-only, no telemetry.
